name: @elda/oxlint-plugin
description: ELDA architecture rules as an oxlint / ESLint-v9-compatible plugin: layer boundaries, cross-domain surface discipline, immutable publication, the inner-layer async/outcome rule, the integration-surface vocabulary gate, and ambient-declaration ownership. Ships elda-viz, a CLI that draws an app's dependency graph as the ELDA-Layers diagram with the same verdicts on every edge.
